message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array with 3 objects. Each object has keys: "question" with one word: Chapters/Description/Structure depending on which question. "feedback": text. "complies": boolean.

We need to evaluate the given text for each question.

Text: "Darba gaitā tiks analizēti dažādi algoritmi, kas izmantoti kombinatoru optimizācijas problēmu risināšanā, tostarp heiristiskās, metaheiristiskās un hiperheiristiskās metodes. Galvenā uzmanība tiks pievērsta tam, kā šīs metodes var pielāgot darba grafiku plānošanai, ņemot vērā specifiskos ierobežojumus un kritērijus. Noslēgumā izstrādātais algoritms tiks novērtēts, salīdzinot tā veiktspēju ar citiem eksistējošiem risinājumiem, lai noteiktu tā efektivitāti un pielāgojamību reāliem darba apstākļiem un organizāciju prasībām.
Ievads ietver trīs daļas:
1.
Tēmas aktualitātes pamatojums un/vai pētījuma motivācija.
2.
Noslēguma darba mērķis un tā sasniegšanai izvirzītie uzdevumi.
3.
Īss katras noslēguma darba nodaļas un pielikumu satura apraksts.
Ievada apjoms ir 1–2 lappuses."

We need to evaluate:

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? The text lists "Ievads ietver trīs daļas:" and enumerates three parts: 1. Tēmas aktualitātes pamatojums... 2. Noslēguma darba mērķis... 3. Īss katras noslēguma darba nodaļas... But these are parts of the introduction, not the main sections of the thesis. It doesn't list main sections like "1. Ievads", "2. Teorētiskā daļa", "3. Eksperimentālā daļa", etc. So it does not list main sections. So compliance: false. Feedback: It lists only parts of the introduction, not the overall thesis structure. Also missing main sections.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? The text describes the introduction's three parts, but not the rest. It also describes the content of the work: analysis of algorithms, adaptation to scheduling, evaluation. But not each section. So partially. But the question: "Does the text briefly describe contents of each section." Since it only lists introduction parts, but not all sections, it's not fully. So compliance: false. Feedback: It gives brief description of introduction parts but not all sections; lacks description of other chapters.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? Since only introduction parts are listed, and no overall structure, it's not clear. So compliance: false. Feedback: The structure is unclear; only introduction parts enumerated; no overview of main chapters.

Thus all three false.

We need JSON array with objects.

The "question" field: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure".

"feedback": text.

"complies": false.
